title: Circular 017/2015: employee and employer contribution rates 2015 to 2016
body: " The information in this circular is now supplemented by circular 009/2017    broad subject: Police Service sub category: Police powers implementation date: 01/04/2015 from: Crime and Policing Group (CPG) - Policing Directorate for more information contact: Paul Nicol 020 7035 1535   Addressed to:   Police forces in England and Wales   Copies are being sent to:   Chief officers Police and Crime Commissioners Police pension administrators  "
